sections.title: REFERENCES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate references for an Annual Product Review for {product_name}. Include QA- product review SOPs, stability protocols, release specs (TM-), and relevant regulatory filings. {description}

sections.title: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
sections.llm_prompt: Write a 1-paragraph executive summary of an Annual Product Review for {product_name}. State the review period, overall product health, number of batches, major trends, and any required actions.

sections.title: Manufacturing Summary
sections.llm_prompt: Summarize manufacturing activity for {product_name} during the review period. Cover batches produced, process performance trends, critical process parameters, and any out-of-trend observations.

sections.title: Quality Data Trends
sections.llm_prompt: Generate critical quality attribute trending rows for {product_name}. Include identity, purity, potency, impurities, sterility, endotoxin, appearance, and any product-specific attributes.

sections.title: Deviations & CAPA Summary
sections.llm_prompt: Summarize deviations and CAPA activity for {product_name} during the review period. Categorize by type (minor/major/critical), identify recurring issues, and report CAPA effectiveness.

sections.title: Change Control Summary
sections.llm_prompt: Summarize change controls impacting {product_name} during the review period. Include process, equipment, materials, and documentation changes, and their validation status.

sections.title: Complaints, Returns & Recalls
sections.llm_prompt: Summarize complaints, returns, and recalls for {product_name} during the review period. Report volume, categories, investigations, and regulatory impact.

sections.title: Stability Data
sections.llm_prompt: Summarize stability data for {product_name}. Report active stability studies, any OOT or OOS events, shelf-life confirmation, and any regulatory filings.

sections.title: Regulatory Commitments
sections.llm_prompt: List regulatory commitments and post-approval obligations relevant to {product_name}. Include status of each and any gaps.

sections.title: Conclusion & Recommendations
sections.llm_prompt: Write the conclusion and recommendations section of an Annual Product Review for {product_name}. State whether the process remains in a state of control and list any required actions.

default_data.review_type: QUALITY ASSURANCE REVIEW (Refer to QA-030 Annual Product Review)

metadata.regulatory_framework: 21 CFR 211.180(e), ICH Q10, EU GMP Chapter 1
